results.text: Dark Foreboding: Everyone nearby gets a strange feeling of unease, as though somewhere, something terrible has just happened.
Warp Echo: Sounds repeat and distort for several rounds, echoing strangely regardless of the surroundings.
Unholy Stench: A terrible smell permeates the area around the psyker. All characters within the area suffer –10 to Toughness Tests for 1d5 rounds.
Mind Worm: A random person within 10 metres of the psyker suffers –10 to Intelligence Tests for 1 round as unwelcome thoughts worm through their mind.
Hoarfrost: Everything within several metres of the psyker is covered in a thin layer of frost as the temperature drops sharply for an instant. All surfaces become slippery with ice.
Aura of Taint: All animals within 1d100 metres of the psyker are spooked and flee the area. Characters with Psyniscience can pinpoint the psyker as the source.
Memory Worm: Everyone within 5 metres of the psyker must make a Willpower Test or forget the events of the last 1d5 rounds.
Grave Chill: The temperature drops dramatically. Breath mists in the air and frost forms on exposed skin. Everyone within the area suffers –10 to Agility Tests for 1d5 rounds.
Warp Whispers: All characters within 5 metres hear dark, sinister whispering. Each must make a Willpower Test or suffer –5 to Willpower for 1d5 rounds.
Torn Veil: Ghostly images flicker at the edges of vision. The area around the psyker counts as lightly obscured for the duration.
Daemonic Mask: The psyker’s face momentarily takes on a terrifying daemonic visage, gaining Fear (1) for 1 round. The psyker also suffers 1 Corruption Point.
Unnatural Aura: Machines malfunction and lights flicker throughout the area. All Tech-Use Tests in the area suffer –10 for 1d5 rounds.
Blood Rain: Blood falls from the sky or ceiling in a 3d10 metre area around the psyker. Surfaces become slick and the sight is deeply unsettling.
Spirit Plague: Everyone within 10 metres of the psyker suffers –10 to Willpower Tests for 1d5 rounds as a miasma of despair settles over the area.
Spectral Gale: A howling, unnatural wind tears through the area. All Ballistic Skill Tests suffer –10 and small, loose objects are blown about violently.
Bleeding Walls: Walls and the ground begin to ooze blood. The area becomes difficult terrain for 1d5 rounds.
The Earth Protests: The ground shakes violently. Everyone in the area must pass an Agility Test or be knocked prone.
Psy Discharge: The psyker takes 1d5 Energy damage, ignoring armour, as warp energy arcs through their body.
Warp Ghosts: Ghostly figures appear throughout the area. All characters except the psyker must pass a Willpower Test or be Stunned for 1 round.
Falling Upwards: Gravity reverses within 5 metres of the psyker for 1 round. Everything not secured rises into the air before crashing back down.
Banshee Howl: A deafening psychic shriek rings out. Everyone within 3d10 metres, including the psyker, is Deafened for 1d5 rounds.
The Furies: The psyker is wracked with pain, taking 1d10 Energy damage that ignores armour and Toughness Bonus as warp energy tears through them.
Shadow of the Warp: An area of impenetrable darkness with a 3d10 metre radius engulfs the psyker’s location for 1d5 rounds.
Tech Scorn: All technology within 5 metres of the psyker ceases to function for 1d5 rounds. Weapons jam, augmetics seize, and lights die.
Warp Madness: A random person within 10 metres of the psyker gains 1d5 Insanity Points as visions of the warp flood their mind.
Perils of the Warp!: The warp tears open! Roll on the Perils of the Warp table immediately.
